raw_consumer_statement:
Hello. I am XXXX XXXX, and I keep up very diligently with my credit cards and my credit is very important to me. I have a credit card with Best Buy, and a lot of the time their statement are incorrect, something which hurts my credit. 
Now, this current situation that I am complaining about, the payment due date for this previous month was XX/XX/year>. 
On XX/XX/year>, I made a transaction for {$240.00}. 
On XX/XX/year>, I made another transaction for {$37.00}. 
Both of these transactions I made AFTER the final payment due date, which is as I said XX/XX/year>. 
Despite this fact and despite the email that I sent them, my statement for XX/XX/year> ended up showing that I owed {$280.00}. 
Please have them fix it and from now on show the statement as {$0.00}, because as I said this is not their first time doing this. 
Attached is the last few transactions from the month of XXXX. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
